title: Pesky Seagulls
body:
![Pesky Seagulls](https://github.com/HyperPigeon/pesky-seagulls/raw/1.20/images/pesky_seagulls_banner.png)

A mod made for Modfest 1.20 that adds bothersome seagulls to Minecraft.

## Seagull Features!

- Stealing your food!
- Flying away with your food!
- Eating your food!

Interact with a seagull who stole your food to grab it back from them!

## Credits

Seagull sound effects from https://quicksounds.com
